astrologers can't be sure what is birth time, how they are going
to predict the future of native based on the same?! Some
depend on logic, and some on ancient advice, and some are
still confused - what to do when logic and advice contradict?
More than the fact that there is much difference of opinion
regarding this, the thing that usually worries the astrologers,
is the absence of any argument that is logical and authentic at
the same time, and the non-availability of ancient Rishi hora
quotes on the same. If even the astrologers are in doubt about
the prime premise (i.e Birth time) on which his derivations
rest, how can we expect others to trust it? If only we are able

6 Secrets of Birth Time Rectification

determination with the support of authentic references, the
